uplink.description: Status report, no shock alarm (motion false), normal battery
Status report, shock/tamper alarm (motion true), low battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: bytes[4]=0xA0 sets the low-battery high bit (3.2 V), bytes[5..7]=300 mA, bytes[8..10]=200 mA, bytes[11]=0x05 sets LowCurrent1+LowCurrent2, bytes[12]=0x01 shock alarm. expected.data authored from the upstream reference decode (Volt '3.2(low battery)', Current1 300mA, Current2 200mA, alarm flags, ShockTamperAlarm 'Alarm').

Upstream startup example is 10 bytes; right-padded to the 13-byte status-frame length so the reportType 0x00 device-info branch is exercised rather than the length guard. The four datecode bytes (25,17,18) are unchanged from the TTN example input.

uplink.description: Config report response on fPort 23 (no measurement)

uplink._note: Synthetic short payload to exercise the length guard.
